figures.caption: Figure 1: Illustration of the impact of intent prediction uncertainty on autonomous vehicles decision making in complex mixed-traffic environments.
Table 1: Performance comparison of different methods under varying traffic scenarios.
Figure 3: Ablation study results between UAMP with its two variants across three experimental scenarios..
Figure 4: Comparison of performance metrics under varying autonomous vehicle penetration in the 3-Lane scenario.

Figure 2: Overview of the UAMP framework. UAMP estimates proximity-aware uncertainty in human intent prediction from an ego-centric perspective and incorporates this uncertainty into long-horizon decision making through uncertainty-calibrated value learning.
